name: Core Lithium Ltd
analysis: CXO has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 24% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$0.2950, stop A$0.2277, target A$0.3325 (0.56:1) — then trail it.
